title: H.C. Wainwright Maintains Buy Rating on Allogene Therapeutics (ALLO)
text: H.C. Wainwright Analyst Rating Update on Allogene (ALLO). Rating: Buy (maintained). Price Target: Lowered to $11 from $12. Date: April 15, 2026. H.C. Wainwright maintained bullish stance despite target adjustment. Stock decline characterized as unwarranted. Analyst sees pullback as attractive buying opportunity. Adjustment followed $175M common stock offering announcement that pressured share price.
